---
title: " "
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="hero">
<h1>Hi, I'm Lonnie.</h1>
<p>Biotechnology professional &bull; Molecular biology &amp; biomanufacturing &bull; Data-curious</p>
</div>

I'm a biotechnology professional with hands-on experience in molecular biology, biomanufacturing, and lab quality systems, alongside a growing interest in using data and code as research tools. This site hosts my CV, research projects, and a data analysis project from my coursework.

<div class="badge-row">
<span class="badge">Molecular Cloning</span>
<span class="badge">Cell Culture</span>
<span class="badge gold">Biomanufacturing</span>
<span class="badge">Lab Quality Systems</span>
<span class="badge gold">R</span>
<span class="badge">Data Analysis</span>
</div>

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Quick Links

<div class="card-links">
<a class="card-link" href="cv.html"><span class="card-icon">📄</span><span class="card-label">My CV</span></a>
<a class="card-link" href="research.html"><span class="card-icon">🧬</span><span class="card-label">Research Projects</span></a>
<a class="card-link" href="final_project.html"><span class="card-icon">📊</span><span class="card-label">Final Project</span></a>
<a class="card-link" href="contact.html"><span class="card-icon">📫</span><span class="card-label">Contact Me</span></a>
</div>

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## About Me

I hold a bachelor's degree in Biotechnology and work at the intersection of the bench and the process — from molecular cloning and cell culture to media production and lab documentation. I'm drawn to problems that combine careful experimental work with the kind of pattern-finding that data analysis makes possible.

Outside of work, you'll probably find me tending my garden, exploring new PC hardware, or watching anime.

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Featured Project

Take a look at a data analysis project exploring the relationship between critic/fan scores, sales, and music in *Sonic the Hedgehog* games:

[See Final Project](final_project.html)
